waypoints.note: Embarked, transports forming off Omaha during the run-in. Position approximate (transit area V, Force O).

disputedBy.claim: Beevor notes several 16th RCT first-wave craft were 5–15 minutes late due to cross-current and lost their planned landing points; touchdown was therefore staggered, not simultaneous at H-Hour.

waypoints.note: 16th RCT (spearhead) first wave touches down on Easy Red / Fox Green sectors of Omaha. Position approximates the Easy Red sector centerline.
Heavy fire pinned the assault at the seawall through the morning; engineer detachments work to clear beach exits E-1 (Saint-Laurent) and E-3 (Colleville).
Mid-day: lead elements working up the bluffs behind Easy Red; 18th RCT landing in follow-up waves.
Bluff line secured at several points; fighting moves into Saint-Laurent-sur-Mer and toward Colleville.
End of MVP window: shallow beachhead ~1–2km inland; Colleville-sur-Mer contested. Position is approximate division centroid.
